head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: E-45: Teacher route baseline — hard targets everywhere (reproduce E-39). dense_fg_aux 8ep probe. All targets are binary (hard PNG masks, hard bbox rectangles). Serves as control for E-46/E-47 soft-target experiments. Core question: can softer teacher-style dense targets (E-46/E-47) improve over this hard-target baseline? Expected pf_mIoU ~0.82-0.83 matching E-39.
